description: Yahoo Ads is an advertising platform where businesses can display ads across Yahoo's own properties, like its Mail, News, and Sports sites, as well as on other third-party websites, apps, and connected TVs.

name: ECH
description: Encrypted Client Hello. The tag is presented only when ECH exists, but SNI doesn't exist.
